title: AWS EKS Deployment Platform
description: Built reusable Terraform modules to provision VPC, EKS, IAM, and observability baselines with environment promotion through Git workflows.
impact: Reduced cluster provisioning effort from days to hours and improved release consistency across environments.

title: Observability and Alerting Stack
description: Implemented centralized metrics, logs, and dashboards with alert rules for service SLO visibility and proactive incident handling.
impact: Improved incident triage speed and reduced MTTR with unified dashboards and alert routing.

title: Jenkins to Kubernetes CI/CD
description: Designed CI/CD pipelines for build, security checks, container publishing, and controlled Kubernetes rollout using deployment gates.
impact: Cut manual release steps and increased deployment reliability with automated quality checks.
